abu_dhabi_weekend_smallest_spread_and_co.note: Abu Dhabi weekend smallest field spread with comparison

canonical_id_lookup_abu_dhabi_2025_race.note: resolves canonical session id for Abu Dhabi 2025 race

compound_degradation_curve.note: per-compound lap-time degradation curve over tire age

driver_pair_brake_zones.note: compares two drivers' braking points per corner

driver_pair_lap1_positions.note: lap-1 running-order positions for a driver pair

driver_pair_performance_radar.note: multi-metric performance radar comparing two drivers

driver_pair_sector_dominance.note: which driver is faster per sector, head-to-head

driver_pair_stint_delta.note: cumulative lap-time delta between two drivers per stint

driver_pair_strategy_split.note: compares pit/tire strategy split between two drivers

driver_pair_wet_crossover.note: wet-vs-dry pace crossover point for a driver pair

driver_telemetry_overlay.note: overlays lap telemetry traces for compared drivers

fastest_lap_by_driver.note: each driver's single fastest lap in a session

inferred_overtakes.note: on-track overtakes inferred from lap position changes

max_leclerc_avg_clean_lap_pace.note: Verstappen vs Leclerc average clean-lap pace

max_leclerc_common_lap_window_pace.note: pace over a common shared lap window

max_leclerc_compounds_used.note: tire compounds each driver ran in the race

max_leclerc_fastest_lap_per_driver.note: fastest lap for each of the two drivers

max_leclerc_fastest_lap_telemetry_window.note: telemetry window around each driver's fastest lap

max_leclerc_final_third_pace.note: pace over the final third of the race

max_leclerc_lap_degradation_by_stint.note: per-stint lap-time degradation slope by driver

max_leclerc_lap_pace_summary.note: summary of lap pace metrics per driver

max_leclerc_opening_closing_stint_length.note: opening and closing stint lengths per driver

max_leclerc_pit_laps.note: the lap numbers on which each driver pitted

max_leclerc_pit_stop_count.note: count of pit stops made by each driver

max_leclerc_position_change_around_pit_c.note: position change across each driver's pit cycle

max_leclerc_positions_gained_or_lost.note: net positions gained or lost per driver

max_leclerc_post_pit_pace.note: pace on laps immediately after pitting

max_leclerc_pre_post_pit_pace.note: pace before versus after the pit stop

max_leclerc_qualifying_improvement.note: Leclerc's lap-time improvement across qualifying segments

max_leclerc_running_order_progression.note: running-order position progression lap by lap

max_leclerc_sector_comparison.note: sector-time comparison between the two drivers

max_leclerc_shortest_pit_stop.note: shortest pit-stop duration for each driver

max_leclerc_stint_lengths.note: length in laps of each driver's stints

max_leclerc_stint_pace_vs_tire_age.note: stint pace regressed against tire age

max_leclerc_strategy_type.note: classifies each driver's race strategy type

max_leclerc_top_speed.note: top speed recorded for each driver

max_leclerc_total_pit_time.note: total time each driver spent in pit lane

minisector_dominance.note: which driver owns each minisector, head-to-head

monaco_2025_sessions_most_complete_telem.note: Monaco 2025 sessions with most complete telemetry coverage

practice_laps_vs_race_pace_same_meeting.note: practice lap pace versus race pace, same meeting

race_position_changes.note: position changes across the race per driver

session_race_control_incidents.note: race-control incidents logged for the session

session_race_trace.note: gap-to-leader race trace for the session

sessions_most_complete_downstream_covera.note: sessions ranked by downstream data coverage

sessions_telemetry_without_weather.note: sessions with telemetry but missing weather data

single_driver_pace_cliff.note: detects a single driver's pace-cliff lap

single_driver_pit_cycle.note: single driver's pit-cycle position and pace timeline

single_driver_speed_map.note: single driver's speed mapped onto track outline

top10_fastest_laps_overall.note: the ten fastest laps overall in a session

driver_pair_corner_delta.note: per-corner entry/apex/exit delta from each driver's best-apex lap

session_type_share.note: count of sessions by session_type for a season

anthropic.note: LLM-synthesized answer; honest structured success outcome

anthropic_repaired.note: LLM answer after JSON repair; structured success outcome

deterministic_template.note: zero-LLM template answer; structured success outcome

heuristic_after_sql_timeout.note: heuristic answer after SQL timed out; structured degraded outcome

heuristic_fallback.note: heuristic fallback answer; structured degraded outcome

heuristic_unavailable.note: heuristic could not produce; honest structured unavailable outcome

initial.note: not a generationSource value — regex neighbour literal on a generationSource/queryPath line

muted.note: not a generationSource value — regex neighbour literal on a generationSource/queryPath line

repair_retry.note: not a generationSource value — regex neighbour literal on a generationSource/queryPath line

runtime_failed_before_sql.note: runtime failed pre-SQL; honest structured failure outcome

runtime_transient_db_unavailable.note: transient DB outage; honest structured retryable outcome

runtime_unavailable.note: runtime unavailable; honest structured failure outcome

sql_generation_failed.note: SQL generation failed; honest structured failure outcome

chat_query_failed.note: chat query failed; yields honest structured error response

column_validation_failed.note: SQL column validation failed; yields honest structured error response

completeness_blocked.note: blocked on incomplete data; yields honest structured refusal

error.note: generic error; yields honest structured error response

fallback_exec_failed.note: fallback execution failed; yields honest structured error response

heuristic_unavailable.note: heuristic unavailable; yields honest structured unavailable response

internal.note: internal error; yields honest structured error response

no_data_refusal.note: yields honest structured no-data refusal response

resolve_db_timeout.note: resolver DB timeout; yields honest structured retryable response

sql_generation_failed.note: SQL generation failed; yields honest structured error response

sql_pipeline_no_result.note: SQL pipeline returned nothing; yields honest structured no-result response

sql_repair_timeout.note: SQL repair timed out; yields honest structured error response

template_exec_failed.note: template execution failed; yields honest structured error response

template_exec_timeout.note: template execution timed out; yields honest structured error response

transient_db_unavailable.note: transient DB outage; yields honest structured retryable response

minisector-strip.tsx -> /api/track-outli.note: renders strip without outline; track map only when outline present

telemetry-overlay-chart.tsx -> /api/lap-.note: payload===null renders 'No lap telemetry'; no traces without fetch

track-corner-delta.tsx -> /api/track-out.note: renders corner list without outline; map only when outline+zones present

track-map.tsx -> /api/track-outline.note: useTrackOutline hook definition; backs track_speed_map which is meaningless without outline

track-speed-map.tsx -> /api/track-outlin.note: outline===null renders 'No location telemetry'; no chart without fetch

corner-delta-grid.tsx -> /api/track-outl.note: A5 corner nodes; tiles + diverging ladder render without outline

corner-mini-map.tsx -> /api/track-outlin.note: A1 corner-on-map; returns null when outline/corner unresolved, card keeps metrics

status-grid.tsx -> /api/track-outline.note: A3 venue tiles fetch per-circuit outline; fall back to status dot when absent

telemetry-overlay-chart.tsx -> /api/trac.note: A2 biggest-delta minimap; overlay traces render without it

timeline-chart.tsx -> /api/track-outline.note: A4 on-track incident pin; lanes render without it

metric_grid.note: rendered via MetricGridRenderer metrics slot, not a ChartRenderer case
